description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/volviq/cmake-testing:latest. Define two stages named build and test. Add a cmake_hello job that runs in the build stage and executes the exact shell commands: cd hello-world, mkdir build && cd build, cmake .. && make && find ., and ./hello. No caches, artifacts, services, variables, or special rules are required, and the test stage remains empty.
